memoryArtifacts.headline: The Garretts -- Before America
memoryArtifacts.description:
The Garretts — Before America
by John E. Garrett
Last year, I published my work entitled, "1000 Years of Garrett Family History". The emphasis in that effort
was the genealogy of the Garretts since their immigration to America in the mid-seventeenth century. This
work examines how the Garretts evolved during the generations that they spent in England, Wales and
Ireland from the time the first ancestor landed in England until the first Garrett came to America.
My research involved the use of:
 A commercial genealogy website named Ancestry.com.
 Extensive use of the Google search engine on the Internet
The first 100 years, starting in the eleventh century, was the most interesting. That was where I found a
remarkable relationship between my ancestors and King Edward the Confessor, King William the Conqueror
and King Henry I. My first ancestor to land in England, Otho Geraldini, grew-up with Edward before he
became King; his son Walter FitzOtho was in William, the Bastard's army; and his son Gerald grew-up with
Prince Henry (King William"s son) who became King Henry I. Their close relationship is demonstrated by the
vast amount of land, castles and titles bestowed upon them.
In retrospect, I am impressed at how important the genes of the spouses are to the family's genealogy. The
best example of this is when my ancestor, Gerald of Windsor married Nesta Rhys, a Welsh Princess. There
offsprings were all outstanding. The next "high" came when the Garrett's became merchants in the 16th
century, opened trade with Russia, became Lord Mayor of London and honorary knighthood.
To make this work more readable, I have placed several interesting "asides" in the Appendix. For example,
the de Clares, of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare fame married into the Garretts. I found extensive genealogy
on the ancestry of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare going back before 100 AD. So, I put his data into two
appendices. One for the French ancestors and another for the Viking ancestors.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Offley於大約1040年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，她的父親Piers de Valoines31歲，母親Petra de Valonges12歲。她於1067年與Walter de Windsor在威爾士布洛可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1100年在英國英格蘭享年62歲。

zh-hans.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾布洛可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice de Offley于大约1040年出生在英国威尔斯波斯时，她的父亲Piers de Valoines31岁，母亲Petra de Valonges12岁。她于1067年与Walter de Windsor在威尔士布洛可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1100年在英国英格兰享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Offley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Offley (Hertfordshire), Bishops Offley (Staffordshire), or High Offley (Staffordshire). The placenames derive from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Offley was born about 1040, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Piers de Valoines, was 31 and her mother, Petra de Valonges, was 12. She married Walter de Windsor in 1067, in Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1100, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Offley est née environ 1040, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Piers de Valoines, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Petra de Valonges, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Windsor en 1067, à Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1100, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Offley um 1040 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Piers de Valoines 31 und ihre Mutter Petra de Valonges 12. Sie hat 1067 in Pembrokeshire, Wales Walter de Windsor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1100 im Alter von 62 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

ht.Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Offley è nata il circa 1040 nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Piers de Valoines, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Petra de Valonges, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Windsor nel 1067, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1100, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Offleyが約1040年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで生まれた時，父Piers de Valoinesは31歳，母Petra de Valongesは12歳であった。1067年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでWalter de Windsorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1100年にイギリスイギリスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Offley(이)가 대략 1040년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Piers de Valoines(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Petra de Valonges(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1067년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 Walter de Windsor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1100년 영국 잉글랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Offley nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Piers de Valoines, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Petra de Valonges, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Windsor em 1067, em Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1100, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Offley родилась около 1040 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Piers de Valoines было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Petra de Valonges, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Windsor в 1067 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1100 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice de Offley nació aproximadamente 1040, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Piers de Valoines, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Petra de Valonges, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Walter de Windsor en 1067, en Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1100, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
